name: Integrating Cybersecurity and Enterprise Risk Management — synthesis of NISTIR 8286 series
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-222 is a forthcoming publication being developed by NIST to synthesize the NISTIR 8286 series (8286 / 8286A-D), which addresses the identification, analysis, and management of cybersecurity risk in the context of enterprise risk management. Not yet published as of the metadata date; placeholder maintained so it gets resolved cleanly once released.
relationToCloudSecurity: General cybersecurity guidance applicable to cloud-environment design and operations.
relationToAISecurity: Foundational cybersecurity guidance; applies to AI system implementations.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

lifecycle.notes: Pre-release: publication under development at NIST as of 2026-05-21. Number was previously thought unpublished (NIST series jumps 800-221 → 800-223 in the public catalog) but is reserved for this forthcoming SCRM/ERM synthesis.

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.

notes: Forthcoming NIST publication synthesizing the NISTIR 8286 series. Track NIST CSRC for release.

desired_end_state.notes: Forthcoming NIST publication. Flip desired_end_state to 'structured'/'extracted' once NIST releases the draft or final.
